---
title: "About"
description: |
  Information about this project and its development.
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
# Note: - As the R package, *EHR*, is still in active development, we recommend installing from our GitHub repository with the following command:
# devtools::install_github('choileena/EHR/EHR/')
```

## About

This website provides web-based tools and R packages for pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic (PK/PD) research, including resources related to *EHR2PKPD*.

The tools and packages presented here are developed to support data extraction, analysis, and precision dosing applications.

For more information, visit [Leena Choi's github](https://github.com/choileena).

## Feedback

If you notice errors or have suggestions, please open an issue on the GitHub repository.
